1.name: PE 505
1.description: PE 505 is a high-performance PTFE compression packing engineered for demanding industrial applications. Suitable for pumps, valves, and rotating equipment across diverse industries requiring reliable sealing solutions.
features: Crafted from a unique blend of expanded PTFE, graphite, and MoS₂ for superior performance
Exceptional resiliency combined with outstanding chemical resistance
Superior heat dissipation properties ensure extended service life
Anti-friction design protects shafts and sleeves from premature wear
Dimensionally stable construction requires minimal gland loading
Reliable performance at high speeds with minimal leakage
Smooth operation reduces equipment wear and maintenance costs
Compatible with a wide range of industrial media and applications

2.name: PE 504
2.description: PE 504 offers dependable PTFE sealing for general-purpose industrial applications. Features excellent chemical resistance and operates effectively across a wide temperature range, making it an ideal choice for standard pump and valve applications.
features: Universal chemical resistance across the full pH spectrum (0-14)
Low coefficient of friction extends packing and equipment service life
Self-lubricating design minimizes maintenance requirements
Cost-effective sealing solution for general industrial applications
Easy installation with minimal break-in period required

3.name: HY 504
3.description: HY 504 combines multiple high-performance materials in a hybrid construction to deliver superior sealing across various service conditions. Its unique structural design provides exceptional reliability in demanding industrial environments.
features: Combines benefits of multiple material technologies for enhanced performance
Extended temperature range provides versatility across diverse applications
Excellent wear resistance ensures long-term durability
Broad chemical compatibility suitable for most industrial services
Reduced break-in time simplifies installation and commissioning
